content.json:
# SpyCloud — Defender, Conditional Access & Response Operations

Comprehensive visibility into SpyCloud exposure correlations with Microsoft Defender, Conditional Access events, and automated remediation actions. Track password resets, session revocations, security group assignments, account disables, and all response actions in one place.

content.title: Response Actions Summary

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
let defenderAlerts = SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName has_any ("MCAS", "MDATP", "Azure Advanced Threat Protection", "Microsoft Defender for Identity")
| extend UserPrincipalName = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["User Principal Name"])
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| summarize DefenderAlerts = count() by UserPrincipalName;
let caEvents = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where ConditionalAccessStatus != "notApplied"
| summarize CAEvents = count() by UserPrincipalName;
let remediationActions = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Reset user password", "Revoke sign in sessions", "Add member to group", "Disable account")
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| where UPN in (exposedUsers)
| summarize RemediationActions = count() by UPN;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize MaxSeverity = max(severity), ExposureCount = count() by email
| join kind=leftouter defenderAlerts on $left.email == $right.UserPrincipalName
| join kind=leftouter caEvents on $left.email == $right.UserPrincipalName
| join kind=leftouter remediationActions on $left.email == $right.UPN
| project User = email, MaxSeverity, ExposureCount, DefenderAlerts = coalesce(DefenderAlerts, 0), CAEvents = coalesce(CAEvents, 0), RemediationActions = coalesce(RemediationActions, 0)
| sort by MaxSeverity desc, DefenderAlerts desc
content.title: Exposed Users — Cross-Platform Correlation Matrix

content.query:
union
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has_any ("Reset user password", "Change user password") | extend ActionType = "Password Reset", ActionTime = TimeGenerated | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, bin(ActionTime, 1h)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Revoke sign in sessions" | extend ActionType = "Session Revocation", ActionTime = TimeGenerated | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, bin(ActionTime, 1h)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Add member to group" | where TargetResources[0].displayName has_any ("SpyCloud", "Blocked", "Restricted", "Compromised") | extend ActionType = "Security Group Add", ActionTime = TimeGenerated | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, bin(ActionTime, 1h)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Disable account" | extend ActionType = "Account Disable", ActionTime = TimeGenerated | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, bin(ActionTime, 1h)),
(SecurityAlert | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ProviderName has_any ("MCAS", "MDATP", "Microsoft Defender") | extend ActionType = "Defender Alert", ActionTime = TimeGenerated | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, bin(ActionTime, 1h))
| project ActionTime, ActionType, Count
content.title: Response Actions & Defender Alerts Over Time

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName has_any ("MCAS", "MDATP", "Azure Advanced Threat Protection", "Microsoft Defender for Identity", "Microsoft Cloud App Security")
| extend UserPrincipalName = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["User Principal Name"])
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, UserPrincipalName, ProviderName, Description, Tactics, Techniques
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Defender Alerts for SpyCloud-Exposed Users

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProviderName has_any ("MCAS", "MDATP", "Azure Advanced Threat Protection", "Microsoft Defender")
| summarize AlertCount = count() by ProviderName
| sort by AlertCount desc
content.title: Defender Alert Distribution by Provider

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand AlertIds
| join kind=inner (
  SecurityAlert
  | extend UserPrincipalName = tostring(parse_json(ExtendedProperties).["User Principal Name"])
  | where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
) on $left.AlertIds == $right.SystemAlertId
| summarize AlertCount = dcount(AlertName), Alerts = make_set(AlertName, 5) by IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, UserPrincipalName, Status
| sort by AlertCount desc
content.title: Defender XDR Multi-Alert Incidents with Exposed Users

content.query:
let infectedHosts = SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct user_hostname;
DeviceInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where DeviceName in (infectedHosts)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, OSPlatform, PublicIP, DeviceId, MachineGroup
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Infected Devices Still Active in MDE Inventory

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| mv-expand ConditionalAccessPolicies
| extend PolicyName = tostring(ConditionalAccessPolicies.displayName),
         PolicyResult = tostring(ConditionalAccessPolicies.result)
| summarize Count = count() by PolicyResult
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Conditional Access Policy Results for Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where ResultType == 0
| where ConditionalAccessStatus == "notApplied" or ConditionalAccessStatus == "success"
| where ClientAppUsed in ("Exchange ActiveSync", "IMAP4", "POP3", "SMTP", "Authenticated SMTP", "Other clients")
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, ClientAppUsed, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, ConditionalAccessStatus
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Legacy Authentication Bypassing CA for Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where ResultType == 0
| extend IsCompliant = tostring(DeviceDetail.isCompliant), IsManaged = tostring(DeviceDetail.isManaged)
| summarize SuccessfulSignIns = count() by UserPrincipalName, IsCompliant, IsManaged, ConditionalAccessStatus
| sort by SuccessfulSignIns desc
content.title: Device Compliance Status for Exposed User Sign-ins

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 25
| distinct email;
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize IPCount = dcount(IPAddress), IPs = make_set(IPAddress, 5), TokenUseCount = count() by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where IPCount >= 2
| sort by IPCount desc
content.title: Token Replay Detection — Multi-IP Non-Interactive Sign-ins

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| summarize ActivityCount = count() by Operation
| sort by ActivityCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Top O365 Operations by Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| where Operation in ("New-InboxRule", "Set-InboxRule", "New-TransportRule", "Set-TransportRule", "Set-Mailbox", "Enable-TransportRule")
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, Parameters = tostring(Parameters), ClientIP
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Mailbox Rule Changes by Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| where Operation in ("SharingSet", "AnonymousLinkCreated", "SharingInvitationCreated", "MemberAdded", "AddedToSecureLink")
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeObjectId, ClientIP, OfficeWorkload
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: External Sharing Activity by Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| where Operation in ("FileDownloaded", "FileSyncDownloadedFull")
| summarize DownloadCount = count(), UniqueFiles = dcount(OfficeObjectId) by UserId, ClientIP
| where DownloadCount >= 20
| sort by DownloadCount desc
content.title: Bulk Download Activity by Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| mv-expand ip = ip_addresses
| project ExposedIP = tostring(ip), email, severity;
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where SourceIP in (toscalar(exposedIPs | summarize make_set(ExposedIP)))
| summarize Connections = count(), Actions = make_set(DeviceAction) by DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, SourceIP
| sort by Connections desc
content.title: Firewall Activity from Exposed IPs

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceAction has_any ("Deny", "Drop", "Block", "Reject")
| summarize BlockedConnections = count() by DeviceVendor, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Firewall Blocked Connections Over Time
Suspicious DNS Queries from Infected Devices

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Caller in (exposedUsers)
| where OperationNameValue has_any ("Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups", "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls", "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies")
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ActivityStatusValue
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Azure Firewall & NSG Changes by Exposed Users

content.query:
let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize MaxSev = max(severity), ExposureTime = min(TimeGenerated) by email;
let pwdResets = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Reset user password", "Change user password")
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| summarize PasswordReset = true, ResetTime = min(TimeGenerated) by UPN;
let sessionRevokes = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName == "Revoke sign in sessions"
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| summarize SessionRevoked = true, RevokeTime = min(TimeGenerated) by UPN;
let groupAdds = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName == "Add member to group"
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), GroupName = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| where GroupName has_any ("SpyCloud", "Blocked", "Restricted", "Compromised", "HighRisk", "MediumRisk")
| summarize AddedToGroup = true, GroupNames = make_set(GroupName) by UPN;
let mfaEnforced = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Admin registered security info", "Require re-register MFA")
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| summarize MFAEnforced = true by UPN;
let accountDisabled = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName == "Disable account"
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| summarize AccountDisabled = true by UPN;
exposedUsers
| join kind=leftouter pwdResets on $left.email == $right.UPN
| join kind=leftouter sessionRevokes on $left.email == $right.UPN
| join kind=leftouter groupAdds on $left.email == $right.UPN
| join kind=leftouter mfaEnforced on $left.email == $right.UPN
| join kind=leftouter accountDisabled on $left.email == $right.UPN
| project User = email, Severity = MaxSev, ExposureTime,
         PasswordReset = coalesce(PasswordReset, false),
         SessionRevoked = coalesce(SessionRevoked, false),
         AddedToGroup = coalesce(AddedToGroup, false),
         MFAEnforced = coalesce(MFAEnforced, false),
         AccountDisabled = coalesce(AccountDisabled, false),
         GroupNames = coalesce(GroupNames, dynamic([]))
| extend RemediationScore = toint(PasswordReset) + toint(SessionRevoked) + toint(AddedToGroup) + toint(MFAEnforced) + toint(AccountDisabled)
| sort by Severity desc, RemediationScore asc
content.title: Remediation Status Per User — Password Reset, Session Revoke, Group Add, MFA, Account Disable

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize ExposureTime = min(TimeGenerated) by email;
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Reset user password", "Revoke sign in sessions", "Disable account")
| extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| join kind=inner (SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 | summarize ExposureTime = min(TimeGenerated) by email) on $left.UPN == $right.email
| extend ResponseTimeMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, ExposureTime)
| where ResponseTimeMinutes > 0
| summarize AvgResponseMinutes = avg(ResponseTimeMinutes), MedianResponseMinutes = percentile(ResponseTimeMinutes, 50), P95ResponseMinutes = percentile(ResponseTimeMinutes, 95) by OperationName
| project Action = OperationName, AvgResponseMinutes = round(AvgResponseMinutes, 1), MedianResponseMinutes = round(MedianResponseMinutes, 1), P95ResponseMinutes = round(P95ResponseMinutes, 1)
content.title: Mean Time to Remediate (MTTR) by Action Type

content.query:
union
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has_any ("Reset user password", "Change user password") | extend ActionType = "Password Reset", UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Revoke sign in sessions" | extend ActionType = "Session Revocation", UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Add member to group" | where TargetResources[0].displayName has_any ("SpyCloud", "Blocked", "Restricted", "Compromised", "HighRisk", "MediumRisk") | extend ActionType = "Security Group Add", UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Disable account" | extend ActionType = "Account Disable", UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName has_any ("Admin registered security info", "Require re-register MFA") | extend ActionType = "MFA Enforcement", UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)),
(AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where OperationName == "Consent to application" | extend ActionType = "OAuth Consent Revoke", UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Initiator = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName))
| project TimeGenerated, ActionType, UPN, OperationName, Initiator, Result
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Complete Remediation Action Audit Trail

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize ExposureCount = count(), MaxSev = max(severity) by email
| join kind=leftanti (
  AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | where OperationName has_any ("Reset user password", "Revoke sign in sessions", "Disable account", "Add member to group")
  | extend UPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
  | distinct UPN
) on $left.email == $right.UPN
| project User = email, MaxSeverity = MaxSev, ExposureCount, RemediationStatus = "NO REMEDIATION TAKEN"
| sort by MaxSeverity desc
content.title: Exposed Users WITHOUT Any Remediation Action
